title: Savory Soy Stir Fry
description: A quick and delicious stir fry made with savory flavors, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This dish is a great way to use up any leftover vegetables you have in the fridge.

ingredients.name: Vegetables (bell pepper, carrots, broccoli)
ingredients.notes: Any combination of your favorite vegetables works well

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the vegetables and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until they start to soften.
In a small bowl, whisk together the savory sauce, soy sauce, and milk.
Pour the sauce into the skillet and stir to coat the vegetables.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened and the vegetables are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with crispy fried shallots if desired.
